label: chaos control — still to chaotic spectrum exposed on ctrl_scene
notes: Added 'chaos' channel (0=still, 1=chaotic) to ctrl_scene as const6. Drives three parameters: (1) glsl_shimmer uChaos uniform — rotSpeed mix(0.3,4.5), ringSpeed mix(0.8,8.0), driftMult mix(0.15,1.0), brightness mix(0.15,0.48). (2) blur_shimmer size — tdu.remap(chaos, 0,1, 90,18): very soft blur when still, sharp arms when chaotic. (3) Shimmer visible in shader only — at chaos=0 portals are near-invisible (brightness 0.15), at chaos=1 they dominate frame with fast interference. Default set to 0.5. Audio hookup: map sub_bass_p or energy_scaled → ctrl_scene['chaos'] when ready.

operations.note: Added uChaos uniform — all speeds and brightness now mix() between still/chaotic endpoints
